ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Designs, develops, and implements IoT solutions for agricultural applications, ensuring efficient data collection, processing, and decision-making.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: IoT Solutions Engineers in Agritech work on integrating sensors, devices, and software to monitor and manage agricultural processes, such as crop health, soil moisture, and weather conditions. They must have a strong understanding of IoT technologies, data analytics, and agricultural practices to develop effective solutions.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in pursuing a career in Agritech IoT.
target_degrees: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree looking to transition into Agritech IoT.
acceptable_base_degrees: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

future_builder.description: Experienced professionals in Agritech or IoT looking to advance their skills and knowledge.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2+ years of experience in Agritech or IoT

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields looking to switch to Agritech IoT.
portfolio_proof_required: IoT-based project in agriculture or a related field

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Build an IoT Project in Agriculture
